configurePresets.name: debug-fast
configurePresets.displayName: Debug Fast — без санітайзерів, швидка компіляція
configurePresets.description: Fast debug build for daily development. No sanitizers — compile time ~1-2min. Use qa-debug for pre-release UB/memory checks.

configurePresets.name: qa-debug
configurePresets.displayName: QA Debug — ASan + UBSan + libstdc++ assertions
configurePresets.description: Catches: out-of-bounds vector[], null deref, signed overflow, use-after-free, invalid iterator use. Do NOT run against Wine — use for standalone unit/integration tests only.
